capabilities.acceptance_required: Run mixed real documents through the complete document understanding and knowledge build chain.
capabilities.remaining_gap: TXT/PDF/PNG/Markdown and office/table XLSX/CSV/Markdown batches passed through DU, KB, package, and verification, but broader fallback-on-failure and full UI-driven import remain incomplete.
capabilities.next_required_e2e_step: Drive batch import from the desktop UI and continue the accepted package into Skill generation.

capabilities.acceptance_required: Use preflight decisions to drive a real backend execution plan and preserve per-file traceability.
capabilities.remaining_gap: Preflight recommendations are consumed by real runs and .xlsx now routes to builtin, but fallback-on-failure behavior and UI-driven preflight are not yet proven.
capabilities.next_required_e2e_step: Validate fallback/override behavior on a failing backend route and ensure unsupported routes do not produce false pass claims.

capabilities.acceptance_required: Attempt and audit remediation for PaddleOCR, MinerU, Docling, Marker, OpenDataLoader, and Unstructured.
capabilities.remaining_gap: The remediated backends have not yet been exercised together in the batch Document Understanding to knowledge build workflow.
capabilities.next_required_e2e_step: Consume the remediated runtimes from run-document-understanding over the accepted batch manifest.

capabilities.acceptance_required: Every required backend must pass a real runtime invocation or retain dependency_blocked with remediation evidence.
capabilities.remaining_gap: Per-backend real smoke does not prove the mixed-document workflow or downstream knowledge outputs.
capabilities.next_required_e2e_step: Run the mixed real batch through Document Understanding and preserve backend, cache, and progress traces.

capabilities.acceptance_required: Process a mixed real batch with OCR and document understanding outputs consumed by knowledge base build.
capabilities.remaining_gap: Real mixed and office/table batches produced normalized outputs consumed downstream, but fallback-on-backend-failure and full UI orchestration remain unproven.
capabilities.next_required_e2e_step: Validate backend failure fallback and drive the DU chain from the desktop UI.

capabilities.acceptance_required: Build a usable knowledge base from real document understanding output in the current goal workflow.
capabilities.remaining_gap: Real DU output built passing KB/package artifacts and fed verification/methodology, but Skill generation and Agent binding are not yet proven from the package.
capabilities.next_required_e2e_step: Generate and validate a Skill from the verified methodology and package.

capabilities.acceptance_required: Create and query an index derived from the newly built real knowledge base.
capabilities.remaining_gap: The real KB index was generated and used by local verification traces, but external evidence verification and Agent use of retrieval output remain incomplete.
capabilities.next_required_e2e_step: Use retrieved source traces in Skill generation and then in a bound Agent task.

capabilities.acceptance_required: Verify knowledge claims against source documents and external evidence with reproducible reports.
capabilities.remaining_gap: Local source-grounded verification passed against the office/table KB with no LLM or external network, but OpenCLI/external evidence verification and Agent output verification remain incomplete.
capabilities.next_required_e2e_step: Verify one grounded Agent output through OpenCLI or another approved external evidence source after Agent binding exists.

capabilities.acceptance_required: Extract a reusable methodology from verified knowledge and retain source lineage.
capabilities.remaining_gap: Methodology artifacts were generated from the current real KB with source trace preserved, but no Skill has yet been generated, validated, installed, or executed from them.
capabilities.next_required_e2e_step: Generate and validate a Skill from the accepted methodology artifacts.

capabilities.acceptance_required: Generate an installable Skill from the verified methodology and knowledge package.
capabilities.remaining_gap: A current-goal Skill Suite was generated from the verified methodology, validated, installability-checked, governed with an explicit first-run baseline, and exported as a ready local Skill Pack; external Skill learning, owned Skill generation, Agent binding, external evidence verification, UI workflow, and EXE packaging remain incomplete.
capabilities.next_required_e2e_step: Create and bind a runnable Agent with this Skill Pack and the verified knowledge package, then verify one grounded Agent output with approved external evidence.

capabilities.acceptance_required: Import an external Skill, decompose it, learn its methods, and preserve provenance.
capabilities.remaining_gap: No current-goal real external Skill learning workflow has passed E2E.
capabilities.next_required_e2e_step: Run one external Skill through import, decomposition, and learning with an audit report.

capabilities.acceptance_required: Generate an owned Skill from learned methods without copying unverifiable external content.
capabilities.remaining_gap: Owned Skill generation has no current-goal E2E proof.
capabilities.next_required_e2e_step: Generate, inspect, install, and execute an owned Skill derived from learned methodology.

capabilities.acceptance_required: Create a runnable Agent through the product workflow with persisted configuration.
capabilities.remaining_gap: A current-goal kb_bound Agent Package was created from the verified knowledge package and ready Skill Pack with source_package_id and source_skill_id preserved, but UI creation workflow, multi-agent orchestration, external evidence verification, and EXE packaging remain incomplete.
capabilities.next_required_e2e_step: Verify the generated Agent output with approved external evidence, then connect the creation flow to the UI workflow later.

capabilities.acceptance_required: Bind selected knowledge bases and Skills to a created Agent and verify runtime access.
capabilities.remaining_gap: The generated Agent was bound to pkg_knowledge_base and suite_pkg-knowledge-base, and deterministic local runtime accessed authorized KB evidence with no LLM or network; external evidence verification, multi-agent workflow, full UI workflow, and EXE packaging remain incomplete.
capabilities.next_required_e2e_step: Run external evidence verification against one grounded Agent output through OpenCLI or another approved external source.

capabilities.acceptance_required: Run multiple created Agents in a workspace with observable orchestration and outputs.
capabilities.remaining_gap: No current-goal real multi-Agent orchestration has passed E2E.
capabilities.next_required_e2e_step: Execute a multi-Agent workflow using bound knowledge and Skills with traceable handoffs.

capabilities.acceptance_required: Use OpenCLI or configured external sources to verify knowledge and Agent outputs.
capabilities.remaining_gap: One grounded Agent output was verified against an approved local external/source evidence file with 9 trusted claims, 0 unverified claims, 0 contradictions, no LLM, and no network; external Skill learning, owned Skill generation, multi-agent workflow, UI workflow, report export, and EXE packaging remain incomplete.
capabilities.next_required_e2e_step: Run external Skill import/decomposition/learning or multi-agent workflow using the verified Agent and Skill artifacts.

capabilities.acceptance_required: Configure, diagnose, persist, and exercise user-owned API and proxy settings.
capabilities.remaining_gap: One AnySearch provider profile now supports base URL, optional environment key, proxy/reverse-proxy fields, disabled mode, diagnostics, and a passing anonymous live request. Full UI persistence, Core Bridge execution, real proxy-path smoke, and general provider configuration acceptance remain incomplete.
capabilities.next_required_e2e_step: Later in the plan sequence, save and diagnose the provider profile through External Source Center and execute it through the allowlisted Core Bridge.

capabilities.acceptance_required: Configure and diagnose supported storage backends without false availability claims.
capabilities.remaining_gap: No current-goal UI-to-runtime storage configuration workflow has passed.
capabilities.next_required_e2e_step: Exercise local defaults and one configured external storage path with diagnostics.

capabilities.acceptance_required: Long-running remediation, document processing, knowledge build, and packaging must emit progress events.
capabilities.remaining_gap: Core emitted progress events for DU, KB, and package, and UI has a progress bar surface, but a full desktop UI-driven workflow has not yet been executed end to end.
capabilities.next_required_e2e_step: Drive the same chain from the desktop UI and verify progress rendering against the generated progress_events.jsonl files.

capabilities.acceptance_required: Drive the full workflow through the desktop bridge and present truthful runtime and progress states.
capabilities.remaining_gap: Individual actions are connected, but the complete user workflow and long-task progress are not.
capabilities.next_required_e2e_step: Connect remediation and DU-to-package orchestration to one desktop workflow with progress.

capabilities.acceptance_required: Export complete, openable reports from the full user workflow.
capabilities.remaining_gap: Core/CLI governed report export passed with 196 openable report artifacts, 0 missing required stages, runtime logs/progress streams excluded, and run_manifest/run_summary entrypoints. Desktop UI Export Center, release promotion, and EXE-delivered export acceptance remain incomplete.
capabilities.next_required_e2e_step: After the pre-campaign gate, Section 5 / Campaign 3 is allowed next, but the current governance task does not process any Section 5 project.

capabilities.acceptance_required: Build, install, run, and diagnose the Windows EXE with required local runtimes.
capabilities.remaining_gap: No current-goal EXE packaging or installed-machine acceptance has run.
capabilities.next_required_e2e_step: After product E2E passes, build the Windows package and run install, launch, and doctor acceptance.

next_e2e_gap: Campaign 3 Supplement 4.0 Acceptance Gate passed with verdict accepted_for_campaign_3_final_consistency_gate.
